creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
(In reply to comment #2)
> I confirm this builds in a 10.3 amd64 poudriere jail.
Thanks for review.

(In reply to comment #2)
> I'm just not sure about those timetamp modifications in
> patches, as if the patch is not against the HEAD?
The patches in files directory regenerated with `make makepatch` command, which uses UTC time format. This is done to fix warnings found by portlint.
